tasks.cmd: export K=$(grep '^QDRANT_API_KEY=' /srv/monorepo/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && curl -X DELETE -H "api-key: $K" http://localhost:6333/collections/will && curl -X DELETE -H "api-key: $K" http://localhost:6333/collections/mem0migrations
tasks.verify: curl -s http://localhost:6333/collections | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cols=[c['name'] for c in d['result']['collections']]; print('will' not in cols and 'mem0migrations' not in cols)"

tasks.cmd: sudo systemctl stop hermes-second-brain 2>/dev/null; sudo systemctl disable hermes-second-brain 2>/dev/null; kill -9 $(lsof -t -i :8642 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; echo 'done'
sudo snap remove go 2>/dev/null || true; curl -sL https://go.dev/dl/go1.23.5.linux-amd64.tar.gz | sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf -; export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin; go version
cd /srv/monorepo && export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && go test ./internal/circuitbreaker/... ./internal/swarm/... 2>&1 | tail -5

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/swarm-engine.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Swarm Go Engine
After=network.target
[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/srv/monorepo
Environment=PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/local/go/bin
EnvironmentFile=/srv/monorepo/.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/go/bin/go run cmd/swarm/main.go
Restart=always
User=will
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable swarm-engine --now && sleep 5
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8643/v1/rag -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"erro CH 05 LG","top_k":3}' | python3 -m json.tool
tasks.verify: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8643/v1/rag -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"erro CH 05"}' | grep -q 'answer'

tasks.cmd: cd /srv/hermes-second-brain && docker compose up -d --build api && sleep 10

curl -sf http://localhost:8643/health && curl -sf http://localhost:8642/health && curl -s http://localhost:6333/collections | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cols=[c['name'] for c in d['result']['collections']]; assert 'will' not in cols; assert 'mem0migrations' not in cols; print('PASS')"
